---
title: "Mermaid Flowchart"
description: "How to use plain text to draw Mermaid Flowchart"
author: "Awesome Yi"
date: "2026-04-19"
categories: [mermaid]
# image: cover-image.jpg
---
# Basic syntax

## Graph Types

- left to right (LR)
- top to bottom (TD)

## Shapes

- [rectangle]
- {diamond}
- (rounded)
- ((circle))

## Line Types

--> arrow line
-.- dashed line
--- solid line
A --> B (from node A to node B)

# References

[Official documentation](https://mermaid.js.org/ecosystem/tutorials.html)
